member.name: T:LiveHashQuery
member.remarks: @deprecatedThis query is no longer supported. Requests a livehash associated to an account.

member.name: P:.AccountId
member.summary: The account to which the livehash is associated

member.name: M:CopyArray
member.summary: The SHA-384 data in the livehash
member.param: The array of bytes to be set as hash
